name: Basic Tomato Sauce (Mario)
recipeIngredient: 2 28-oz cans tomatoes, crushed and mixed well with juices
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and garlic; sauté until translucent but not brown, about 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the thyme and carrot; cook for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Add the tomatoes (with juices) to the pan.
5. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to maintain a gentle simmer, stirring occasionally for 30 minutes.
6. Season with salt to taste.
7. Serve immediately or store in the refrigerator for up to one week or freeze for up to six months.
Yield: 6 cups
